title: Hggzeg Coral Fleece Throw Blanket, Fluffy Soft Couch Blanket Warm Bed Blanket Colorful Stripe Pattern Travel Blankets for Bedroom Living Rooms Office 150x200cm
features: 【Material】Coral Fleece Blanket crafts with 100% microfiber polyester fabric all layers, durable, comfy and ultra-plush.
【Double-sided Design】2 in 1, one side is printed flannel. The other side is coffee color lamb cashmere.
【Easy Care】Easy to clean, machine washable, do not bleach. Remain vibrant and fresh after times of washes.

【Multi-purpose】The blanket is not only a couch throw blanket but also a bed blanket, knee blanket, travel blanket, shawl blanket. It is brilliant for having a nap, working, traveling, camping, even home decoration.
【Perfect Gift】Blanket is absolutely essential life, no matter when a blanket can be multi-purpose, any time can bring you warm. So a perfect present for family, wife or friends.
description: Product Description Hggzeg Sherpa Fleece Blanket can bring you cozy and comfortable life. The blanket is warm enough to take a nap on the sofa, or use it to wrap your body to watch a popcorn movie. It is not only a unique decoration, but also an ideal gift that never disappoints. Specifications: Material: 100% polyester Color: Multicoloured Two Dimensions: 127x152cm/50x60" 150x200cm/59x78.7" Care Instructions: Machine washable (below 40℃), do not bleach or iron. If the washing temperature is too high, the product may be damaged or discolored. Other Points Lint-free Non-fading Non-deformed No pungent smell Double-sided Design This throw blanket comes with two sides, one side is soft flannel fleece face while the other side is plush sherpa texture. High Quality Material Made of 100% high-quality polyester fiber. The stitches are neat and firm, the workmanship is exquisite. It is fading-resistant without shedding. Machine Washable Our flannel throw blanket is machine washable in cold water to save your time and energy .Recommended to air dry to keep the blanket in immaculate condition for long. Tips: 1. Depending on your electronic screen settings and the light when the product introduction picture was taken, there may be a slight color difference between the actual product and the picture. 2. Since it is cut by hand, the size may have an error of 1-3 cm, which is within the normal range. Thank you for your understanding and support.
